fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The creation time of the created Privilege. This is returned when the Privilege is properly created.

fields.name: filter
fields.description: Filters the scope of the privilege (e.g. by workspace, id)

fields.name: rights
fields.description: List of rights granted to a user. For now, only "browse" is supported. Therefore, it will give all the rights for now.
